classic.notes:
A full touchscreen redesign of Music Boss Classic for Pebble Time 2 and Round 2. Tap, swipe, and flick to control playback over full-screen album art. Three live layouts - Retro+, Modern Classic, and Modern Time - with deep customization from the on-watch menus: text position, multiple fonts and sizes, colours, drop shadow, album-art modes (full / letterbox), scrim, and one-tap presets. Double-press Up/Down to seek; volume ring overlay. Test build - your feedback shapes what ships.

WHAT'S NEW IN 6.122

Volume:
- Fixed hold-to-adjust volume in the Modern layouts: with long-press set to volume, hold Up or Down and the volume now steps smoothly and stops the instant you let go. Previously it could keep changing on its own once the volume ring appeared - or run in both directions at once.
- The volume ring now stays on screen the whole time you hold, and clears a few seconds after your last change.

browser.notes: The Media Browser is now fully touch-enabled on Pebble Time 2 and Round 2 - every menu is tap and scroll navigable.
